page_title: Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 3 (Novel)
text:
is the third and final of three light novels, in the Attack on Titan: Before the Fall novel series. It is written by Ryō Suzukaze and illustrated by Thores Shibamoto. It was given an English release by Vertical on May 26, 2015 in a compilation novel titled Attack on Titan: Kuklo Unbound that combined Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 2 and Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 3.

The novel along with the other Before the Fall novels would later be adapted into a manga series by Satoshi Shiki.

Chapter Two

Chapter Three

Epilogue

Trivia

In the English compilation book Attack on Titan: Kuklo Unbound, the first three chapters of this novel were redesignated as "Chapter Four," "Chapter Five," and "Chapter Six" due to the immediate continuation of the story.
